title: HD-Soldat Läppli
writer: Jaroslav Hasek, Alfred Rasser, Charles-Ferdinand Vaucher
actors: Alfred Rasser, Immy Schell, Otto Wiesely
plot: Theophil Läppli is a Swiss patriot, who after a trip to Greece tries to recover the democratic roots of Switzerland. With much enthusiasm and idealism he's discovering, that corruption and greed are wide spread in his beloved coun...
